description: Long-term context substrate for coding agents (CLI).
_comment: Lives in a Scoop bucket repo (e.g. cloud-dancer-labs/scoop-celeborn) as bucket/celeborn.json. Install: scoop bucket add celeborn https://github.com/cloud-dancer-labs/scoop-celeborn; scoop install celeborn. The hash is the release asset's sha256 (printed by the release workflow).
